hats.title: 6-Panel Olive Cap
hats.rationale: Olive sits squarely in your warm autumn palette, and the structured 6-panel crown adds height to balance a rounder face.

tshirts.title: Heavyweight Olive Crew Tee
tshirts.rationale: A muted olive crew flatters your athletic build and matches the streetwear vibe you already wear.

combos.rationale: Tonal olive-on-olive reads as a deliberate, coherent streetwear look without two colours competing.
